8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/bloop16/ioBroker.steam/blob/master/package.json)

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/bloop16/ioBroker.steam/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.5.2" at [package.json](https://github.com/bloop16/ioBroker.steam/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
